/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/hash.dir/hash.c.o -o hash   -L/home/orangepi/work/openhitls/testcode/demo/../../build  -L/home/orangepi/work/openhitls/testcode/demo/../../platform/Secure_C/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/orangepi/work/openhitls/testcode/demo/../../build:/home/orangepi/work/openhitls/testcode/demo/../../platform/Secure_C/lib -lhitls_tls -lhitls_pki -lhitls_auth -lhitls_crypto -lhitls_bsl -lboundscheck -lpthread -ldl
